categories.name: Payroll & HR
categories.blurb: Run payroll, file payroll taxes, and stay compliant with US labour law — done for you.

services.name: Payroll Services
services.benefit: End-to-end payroll processing for US businesses — accurate, on time, every time.
services.description: We calculate employee wages, deduct federal and state taxes, issue pay stubs, manage direct deposits, and file quarterly payroll reports so your team gets paid right and your filings stay clean.
whoFor: Founders running payroll for the first time
includes: Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly payroll runs
whyChoose: 100% remote delivery — work with us from anywhere in the US.
IRS-compliant and CPA-supervised — accuracy you can count on.
Flat-rate pricing — no surprise bills, transparent fee structure.

faqs.q: How quickly can you get started?
faqs.a: Most engagements begin within 3–5 business days of our discovery call once documents are shared.

faqs.q: How do we share documents securely?
faqs.a: We provide a secure client portal with end-to-end encryption. We never accept sensitive data over email.

faqs.q: Do you work with clients outside the US?
faqs.a: Yes — we serve NRIs, expats, and US business owners in 30+ countries.
